$description: Elevation tokens — z-index scale and semantic shadow levels. Components must alias through --fo-elevation-* semantic tokens, never reference raw shadows directly.

ground.$description: Baseline — static layout content, page canvas, OrderCard grid

raised.$description: Raised interactive — sticky column headers, pinned summary rows, floating action labels

sticky.$description: Sticky chrome — top app bar, bottom nav bar, persistent GuidedStep progress header

dropdown.$description: Ephemeral menus — OrderCard action menus, filter dropdowns, select options, AlertBanner pinned

overlay.$description: Scrim layer — modal backdrop, sheet backdrop

modal.$description: Modal sheets — SignatureCanvas full-sheet, GuidedStep blocking modal, conflict resolution panel

toast.$description: Toast / snackbar — transient alerts that must clear modal content

tooltip.$description: Tooltip — must pierce everything including toasts

system.$description: System level — OfflineIndicator in reconnecting state, critical error banners that block all interaction

ground.$description: Page canvas, static content, disabled components, sunken inputs. No visual lift.

raised.$description: OrderCard resting, StatusBadge container, GuidedStep items. White surface creates visible lift.

floating.$description: Dropdowns, tooltips, OfflineIndicator fixed-positioned, command palette. Noticeably elevated.

system.$description: Modals, SignatureCanvas sheet, OfflineIndicator reconnecting state. Outdoor sun legibility — shadow must be distinguishable at 50k lux.
